package_title: I will build you a WhatsApp AI catalog & order bot (no paid API)
description:
🔧 I will build you a WhatsApp AI catalog & order bot (no paid API)

I deliver a self-hosted WhatsApp bot that shows your product catalog, answers FAQs, and takes orders 24/7 using Baileys (WhiskeySockets) + Chatwoot + n8n + local LLM — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in, no per-message fees)
• Charge $500-$1,500 setup + $199-$599/mo; your cost $0 (self-hosted, no Twilio/Meta fee)
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($150, 3 days, 1 rev): Single flow, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($600, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 flows, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($1200, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited flows, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your products/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the WhatsApp agent
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.

n8n_workflow.name: deliver-wa-catalog-bot
n8n_workflow.note: Tools: Baileys (WhiskeySockets) + Chatwoot + n8n + local LLM — all free/self-hosted. Replace code node with your agent logic. Baileys repo: https://github.com/WhiskeySockets/Baileys
